summary: Privacy policy page displays correct content structure and legal information, but has significant brand palette violations. The page uses a cream background (#fff8ea) which matches the manifesto requirement for legal pages, but lacks the required diner visual treatment elements like borders and shadows.

violations.description: Legal longform article should use lighter 1px border but no visible border is present on the main content card
Legal longform article should use shadow-sm but no visible shadow is present on the main content card
The 'Back to Flapjack Cloud' and 'support@flapjack.foo' links appear to use rose #b83f5f color as required for legal links

actions: Add 1px border treatment to the legal article card as specified in M.density.6
Apply shadow-sm styling to the legal article card as specified in M.density.7
Verify that link colors match the exact rose specifications in M.palette.10 and M.palette.11
